strengths: 19+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, exceeding the 15-year requirement
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption (Green Map)
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated director-level or principal-level scope — career has remained at senior/staff IC delivery roles without organization-wide technical strategy
AI experience is recent (2025+) and tooling-adjacent; no recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, or ML depth the role emphasizes
No Master's/PhD in an AI-related field and no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving cloud platform strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of principal-level strategic leadership experience
Shallow, recent AI expertise relative to role's AI-strategy focus
Long, versatile engineering tenure with founder experience

response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with the required years of experience, genuine craftsmanship, community teaching, and a founder background that maps to the entrepreneurial preference. However, this is a director-level AI-strategy role demanding recognized AI expertise, cloud platform vision, and influence over executives and strategic customers — areas where the resume shows little evidence. The AI work is recent and infrastructural rather than authoritative, and there is no history of operating at principal scope, making the fit weak despite solid engineering fundamentals.
